name: Bali
tagline: Tropical Paradise Meets Affordable Retirement — Live the Dream in Bali, Indonesia
description: Bali combines spiritual tranquility, jaw-dropping natural beauty, and a thriving international community at remarkably low costs. From the rice terraces of Ubud to the surf breaks of Canggu, Bali offers FIRE retirees a lifestyle centered on wellness, creativity, and outdoor living that feels like a permanent vacation.

quickFacts.visa: 30-day visa on arrival (extendable to 60 days); B211A social visa for 6-month stays; Second Home Visa for those with $130K+ in savings; retirement visa (KITAS) for 55+ with $1,500/mo proof of income
quickFacts.internetSpeed: 30–100 Mbps (varies by area; best in Canggu and Seminyak)
quickFacts.safetyRating: Very Safe — low crime; main risks are motorbike accidents and petty theft
quickFacts.nearestAirport: Ngurah Rai International Airport (DPS) — direct flights to Singapore, Kuala Lumpur, Sydney, Tokyo
quickFacts.climate: Tropical with dry season (Apr–Oct) and wet season (Nov–Mar)

housing.description: Cozy 1-bedroom villa or apartment in Ubud or Sanur with garden access

dining.description: Local warungs for daily meals — nasi goreng, mie ayam, and fresh juices; occasional café dining in Ubud

healthcare.description: Basic international insurance; outpatient care at BIMC or local clinics; serious issues require evacuation to Singapore

transportation.description: Rented scooter for daily travel around the island

entertainment.description: Yoga classes, temple ceremonies, beach days, rice terrace hikes, and local cultural events

1M.lifestyle: A small 1-bedroom villa or apartment in Ubud or Sanur with garden access. Eating mostly at local warungs, which are cheap and good. Getting around by scooter. Basic international health insurance, though serious medical issues require evacuation to Singapore. Yoga classes and beach days are cheap or free. Comfortable on a daily basis, but imported goods and Western dining add up quickly.

housing.description: Charming 2-bedroom private villa with pool in Ubud, Canggu, or Sanur

dining.description: Mix of warungs and the thriving Canggu/Ubud café scene — avocado toast, organic bowls, and excellent Indonesian cuisine

healthcare.description: Comprehensive international health insurance with coverage at BIMC and Siloam hospitals

transportation.description: Scooter plus Grab car for longer trips; occasional driver hire for day trips

entertainment.description: Unlimited yoga studio membership, surf lessons, diving trips, weekend excursions to Nusa islands, live music

2M.lifestyle: A 2-bedroom private villa with pool in Ubud, Canggu, or Sanur. Eating at the growing cafe and restaurant scene several times a week alongside local warungs. Scooter plus Grab for longer trips. Comprehensive international health insurance. Weekend trips to the Gili Islands or Nusa Penida. Life is comfortable and social, with good variety in dining and activities.

housing.description: Spacious luxury 3-bedroom villa with private pool, lush tropical garden, and ocean or valley views in Seminyak, Ubud, or Uluwatu

dining.description: Fine dining at top Bali restaurants like Locavore and Mozaic; beach club lunches at Potato Head and Sundaya

healthcare.description: Premium international insurance with Singapore evacuation coverage; annual health screenings

transportation.description: Private driver on retainer; scooter for quick trips; domestic flights to other Indonesian islands

entertainment.description: Private yoga instructor, premium beach club memberships, scuba diving certifications, weekend luxury resort stays

3M.lifestyle: A spacious 3-bedroom villa with private pool and valley or ocean views in Seminyak, Ubud, or Uluwatu. Regular dining at Bali's top restaurants like Locavore. A driver on retainer for getting around the island. Premium international health insurance with Singapore evacuation coverage. Domestic flights to other Indonesian islands for weekend trips. This budget covers a genuinely affluent life in Bali with regular travel.

housing.description: Architect-designed luxury compound with infinity pool, outdoor pavilion, and panoramic views in prime Uluwatu, Ubud ridge, or beachfront Seminyak

dining.description: Private chef preparing organic local and international cuisine daily; fine dining at top establishments for special occasions

healthcare.description: Top-tier global insurance; executive health checks in Singapore twice yearly; holistic wellness programs

transportation.description: Full-time private driver with luxury SUV; domestic flights; speedboat charters to neighboring islands

entertainment.description: Private surf coaching, exclusive wellness retreats, art studio space, regular trips to Komodo, Raja Ampat, and Lombok

domesticHelp.description: Full-time housekeeper, private chef, gardener, and pool maintenance staff

luxuryExtras.description: Balinese spa treatments weekly, custom surfboard shaping, private ceremonies with local priests, art collecting from Ubud galleries

5M.lifestyle: A large, well-designed villa with infinity pool and panoramic views in a prime location. A housekeeper, a cook for most meals, and a gardener. A full-time driver with a nice SUV. Business class flights for longer trips and regular domestic travel across the Indonesian archipelago. Premium global health insurance with executive checkups in Singapore. Daily life is very comfortable, though Bali's infrastructure limitations — roads, internet, medical facilities — are real regardless of budget.

housing.description: Ultra-luxury beachfront estate or cliff-top compound with multiple pavilions, infinity pool, private beach access, and guest villas; possible second property in Ubud

dining.description: Private chef team with rotating international menus, imported wines and ingredients, exclusive supper clubs with visiting chefs

healthcare.description: Concierge global healthcare; quarterly wellness retreats; immediate access to top specialists in Singapore or Bangkok

transportation.description: Luxury vehicle fleet, full-time driver, private yacht access, helicopter transfers, first-class international flights

entertainment.description: Private island day trips, commissioning local artisans, hosting cultural events, international luxury travel, philanthropy through local foundations

domesticHelp.description: Complete estate staff including chef, butler, multiple housekeepers, gardeners, driver, security, and property manager

luxuryExtras.description: Private yoga and meditation masters, art patronage, custom furniture commissions, yacht charters through the archipelago, eco-tourism investments

10M.lifestyle: A premium beachfront or cliff-top estate with multiple pavilions and possibly a second property in Ubud. A housekeeper, a cook a few times a week, a gardener, and a driver. First-class flights internationally and regular travel across Indonesia. Concierge global healthcare with immediate access to Singapore or Bangkok specialists. This budget far exceeds what Bali's market can absorb — you live at the top of what the island offers, but the island's limited fine-dining scene, patchy infrastructure, and remote location remain real factors.
